# OHIP Response Templates

## Template A: Overview Q&A

1. OHIP concept summary.
2. Main components involved.
3. When this mode/workflow is used.
4. Source file used.

## Template B: Mode Guidance

1. Mode selected.
2. Files touched by that mode.
3. Key checks before/after.
4. Source file(s) used.

## Template C: Implementation Plan

1. Selected mode and prerequisites.
2. Ordered action list.
3. Validation checkpoint.
4. Handoff command or next mode.
5. Source file(s) used.
